headline: Gallagher Fiduciary Buys $40 Million of Vanguard Long-Term Corporate Bond ETF
summary: Vanguard Long-Term Corporate Bond ETF tracks investment-grade debt maturing beyond 10 years, providing exposure to yield and duration.

headline: A Look At CBRE Group (CBRE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Event overview and recent price context Recent trading in CBRE Group (CBRE) comes after a period in which the stock has logged a 1-day return of 1.7% and a past-week return of 5.6%, setting the stage for closer review. See our latest analysis for CBRE Group. That recent pullback, including a 1 month share price return of 20.68% decline and a year to date share price return of 15.98% decline from US$134.59, contrasts with a 1 year total shareholder return of 6.96% and a 3 year total...
